html:
📰 每日 AI 新聞 Top 10 · 2026-07-11
1. Apple Sues OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets產業
蘋果控告OpenAI竊取硬體機密
Apple alleges former employees who joined OpenAI stole trade secrets, including confidential hardware presentations and prototypes, to advance the startup's device plans. The lawsuit also names IO Products.
蘋果指控多名前員工在跳槽OpenAI後，竊取包含機密簡報、原型機及供應商細節等商業機密，協助OpenAI推進硬體裝置計畫，訴訟也一併列名IO Products。
The Verge · 原文連結
2. OpenAI Gets Government Approval for Full GPT-5.6 Rollout, Powers GitHub and Microsoft 365 Copilot模型
OpenAI獲准全面推出GPT-5.6，登上GitHub與M365 Copilot
After nearly two weeks of limited preview, OpenAI received U.S. government clearance to fully launch its GPT-5.6 flagship models Sol, Terra, and Luna, now integrated into GitHub Copilot and Microsoft 365 Copilot.
在限量預覽近兩週後，OpenAI獲美國政府許可全面推出GPT-5.6旗艦模型Sol、Terra與Luna，並登上GitHub與Microsoft 365 Copilot。
iThome · 原文連結
3. Fidji Simo Steps Down From OpenAI's No. 2 Role After Extended Medical Leave產業
OpenAI應用部門執行長Fidji Simo宣布下臺
OpenAI's applications CEO Fidji Simo is stepping down from her full-time role after medical leave proved longer than expected, creating a leadership gap as the company eyes a possible IPO.
OpenAI應用事業群執行長Fidji Simo因病假時間遠超預期，宣布辭去全職職務，轉任兼任顧問，為公司在籌備上市之際留下領導空缺。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
4. SK Hynix Raises $26.5B in the Biggest Foreign IPO in US History產業
SK海力士完成265億美元史上最大外國企業美股IPO
The AI chip boom produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet, as SK Hynix's record-breaking IPO puts pressure on it and Samsung to build new fabs in the US.
AI晶片熱潮催生華爾街史上最大規模的一筆交易，SK海力士完成破紀錄IPO後，與三星一同面臨在美國興建新晶圓廠的壓力。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
5. ChatGPT Work Launches as an AI Agent That Can Work Across Your Apps for Hours產品
OpenAI推出ChatGPT Work，AI代理人可跨應用程式自主完成多步驟工作
OpenAI unveiled ChatGPT Work, expanding ChatGPT into an agent that can gather information across apps and files, plan workflows, and execute multi-step tasks autonomously.
OpenAI推出ChatGPT Work，將ChatGPT從對話工具擴展為可跨應用程式與檔案自主規畫、執行多步驟任務的AI代理人，鎖定企業與知識工作者市場。
iThome · 原文連結
6. Meta Upgrades Muse Spark to 1.1, Opens Developer Access via New Model API模型
Meta升級Muse Spark 1.1，首度開放Model API供開發者存取
Meta's Superintelligence Labs released Muse Spark 1.1, improving agentic planning, tool use, coding, and multimodal understanding, while offering a preview of the new Meta Model API.
Meta超級實驗室發布Muse Spark 1.1，強化模型在代理人任務中的規畫、工具使用與多模態理解能力，並首度釋出Meta Model API預覽版供開發者存取。
iThome · 原文連結
7. EU Tells Meta: Disable Autoplay and Infinite Scroll or Risk Massive Fines政策
歐盟要求Meta關閉自動播放與無限捲動，否則面臨鉅額罰款
The EU's Digital Services Act enforcement may force Meta to overhaul core engagement features across its platforms, targeting design choices regulators say exploit user attention.
歐盟依《數位服務法》要求Meta大幅調整旗下平臺的自動播放與無限捲動等黏著度設計，否則恐面臨鉅額罰款。
Ars Technica · 原文連結
8. Researchers Reveal HalluSquatting, a New LLM Attack That Tricks AI Coding Assistants Into Installing Malware資安
研究揭LLM攻擊新手法HalluSquatting，可誘使AI程式開發助理安裝惡意程式
Tel Aviv University researchers disclosed HalluSquatting, where attackers pre-register fake repositories under names LLMs commonly hallucinate, then plant adversarial prompts executed once an AI assistant fetches the fake resource.
特拉維夫大學等研究人員揭露HalluSquatting攻擊手法，攻擊者搶先註冊LLM容易編造的錯誤資源名稱並植入惡意提示，一旦AI程式開發助理拉取該假資源，就可能執行攻擊者控制的指令。
iThome · 原文連結
9. Open Source AI Matters More Than Ever, Says Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue產業
Hugging Face執行長：開源AI比以往更重要
Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says open source AI adoption is booming, with the company's model and dataset hub now used by roughly half of the Fortune 500.
Hugging Face執行長Clem Delangue表示開源AI採用正快速成長，該公司的模型與資料集平臺已被近半數《財星》500大企業採用。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
10. Microsoft Builds Flint, an AI Visualization Intermediate Language to Simplify Chart Generation研究
微軟打造AI視覺化中介語言Flint，以語意規格簡化圖表生成
Microsoft Research open-sourced Flint, letting AI agents describe charts via human-editable specifications while a compiler automatically fills in axes, color scales, and layout, then compiles to Vega-Lite, ECharts, or Chart.js.
微軟研究院發布開源視覺化中介語言Flint，讓AI代理程式以可由人員修改的規格描述圖表，再由編譯器自動補齊座標軸、色階與版面配置等細節，目前可轉換為Vega-Lite、Apache ECharts或Chart.js格式。
iThome · 原文連結
由 AI News Digest 從各家 RSS 自動挑選、翻譯並寄送
